name: Embassy Bancorp, Inc.
business: Embassy Bancorp, Inc. provides traditional banking and related financial services including accepting deposits and originating commercial, consumer, residential mortgage, and home equity loans. It focuses on individuals, businesses, and professionals in the Lehigh Valley area of Pennsylvania.

exposures.sentence: Additionally, the Company does not lend to fintech start-ups or cryptocurrency-related companies and has not purchased or invested in any securities backed by sub-prime, fintech-related, or cryptocurrency loans.
